name: airsstack
description: airsstack — modular AI development methodology for Claude Code: execution agents, a spec-driven workflow, and per-language guideline plugins.

plugins.name: airsstack
plugins.description: Execution engine: a TDD coder, a merged code+spec reviewer, a claim verifier, and a read-only explorer, plus an orchestration driver, process guidelines, project-local memory, and a concise output mode (inspired by the caveman plugin, github.com/juliusbrussee/caveman).

plugins.name: airsstack-sdd
plugins.description: Spec-driven development workflow: brainstorm an idea into a spec, write a one-objective implementation plan, and execute it with review checkpoints. Adapted from the superpowers plugin (superpowers@claude-plugins-official) with airsstack-specific adjustments.

plugins.name: airsstack-guideline-rust
plugins.description: Rust engineering guidelines and Definition-of-Done, delivered as a lazily-loaded skill.

plugins.name: airsstack-journal
plugins.description: Transparent, note-based experiential memory for the development agent: an Obsidian-compatible journal vault with a deterministic, embedding-free recall index.
